stable.finish-args-host-filesystem-access: After image is edited, the app needs to write the modified file back to its original location, so requires host access. Also to get all the images in the same directory and allow users to view between all of them.

Requires host filesystem access because renaming is technically a directory-level write operation; since the Flatpak file portal only grants access to individual files rather than their parent folders, the sandbox prevents the app from modifying the directory entry to finalize a name change.

stable.finish-args-flatpak-spawn-access: Required for host shell access

stable.finish-args-unnecessary-xdg-config-cosmi: Required to listen for changes in the host and write app configuration files

*.finish-args-own-name-wildcard-org.kde: Initial import, outdated Qt, still uses legacy StatusNotifier implementation

stable.finish-args-flatpak-spawn-access: Required to get/check xdg-desktop-portal version
